rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ELIZABETH LEETS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Petition For Appointment Of Arbitrator Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1281.6
rulings.Rulings: PETITIONER ELIZABETH LEETS MOTION Notice Of Petition For Appointment Of Arbitrator Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1281.6 GRANT PETITION TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR AND CONDUCT ARBITRATION ON FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: COURT FINDS INSURANCE COMPANY IS OBLIGATED TO FOLLOW CONDITIONS IN ITS POLICY RE ARBITRATION. POLICY PROVIDES FOR ARBITRATION WHERE PLAINTIFF PRESIDES WHICH IS CONNETICUT. UNLESS PARTIES OTHERWISE AGREED - POLICY PROVIDES FOR METHOD OF APPOINTING OF ARBITRATORS BUT THERE ARE NO PROVISIONS THAT HAVE NOT BEEN FOLLOWED. ACCORDINGLY COURT WILL APPOINT ARBITRATORS FROM LISTS SUPPLIED BY PARTIES IN ACCORDENCE WITH CCP1281.6. DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE LISTS OF 5 PROPOSED ARBITRATORS AT HEARING OR WITHIN 5 DAYS. COURT WILL PROCEED TO FOLLOW PROCEDURES SET FORTH IN CCP1281.6 FROM WHATEVER LISTS SUPPLIED BY PARTIES IRRESPECTIVE OF WHETHER ANY PARTY FAILS TO PROVIDE LIST. (D302/AJR/MN)
